subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Us unto him who hath companioned with his Lord yet knew Him not, who hath heard the Call of God yet answered it not, at every moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا للذی عاشر مع ربه و ما عرفه و سمع ندآءالله و ما اجابه و فی کل حین
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as sun, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
